_comment: Canonical iOS->server wire header manifest for POST /api/apple/batch. Source of truth for the names; iOS mirrors this file at ios_app/Tests/HealthSyncTests/Fixtures/ios-headers.json. Enforced by tests/contract/api_v1/test_v1_ios_headers.py (server consumes every header + completeness), the iOS HeaderContractTests (app emits exactly these), and tests/contract/test_ios_headers_in_sync.py (byte-equal mirror). Renaming a header on either side is an iOS-app-breaking change.
